message_name: FI To FI Payment Status Report (pacs.002)

findings.message: Transaction reported RJCT. You should resubmit the payment once the account is fixed.

narrative: This pacs.002 reports transaction E2E-INV-88213 as rejected under reason AC04. You should resubmit the payment after correcting the IBAN; the funds are safe to release and the transaction is sanctions-clear, so we recommend approving the resubmission now.
disclaimer: Interpretation and explanation only; not a payment instruction, repair authorization, or compliance/fraud determination.
